title: tests: fix rootless tests with an updated runc

comments.body: @giuseppe Why is this a WIP PR?
@rhatdan I have to see if it is enough to get the CI tests working or I'll have to do more changes
@giuseppe Sure, although we won't merge unless tests pass anyways.
ok it is a regression in runc, PR here: https://github.com/opencontainers/runc/pull/1918
